root_cause_hypothesis: FUSE fallocate on an open fd routes through FsWriterBase::resize, which always called complete() when len>0; redundant complete on already-committed data surfaces generic FsError mapped to EIO during LTP fallocate01/03.
planned_changes: Flush pending block writers before resize only when cur_writer/cache_writers are non-empty.
Refresh local FileBlocks from CompleteFile response so resize runs against current metadata.
Prefer inode-level active writer in fs_resize for fallocate/truncate ordering.
not_goals: Do not change punch-hole or zero-range fallocate modes.
Do not alter unrelated fcntl/mknod/FIO paths.
Do not add new RPC codes.
verification_plan: cargo clippy -p curvine-client -p curvine-fuse -p curvine-common -- -D warnings

risk.rationale: Tightens resize/complete coordination for open writers; behavior unchanged when no pending blocks.
